zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Ellen Cheney於1607年出生在英國賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德時，她的父親Lawrence John Cheney41歲，母親Julian Waldron41歲。她於大約1627年與Peter Woodward Sr.在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1666年6月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Ellen Cheney于1607年出生在英国賀特福爾比曉普也斯 斯托特福德时，她的父亲Lawrence John Cheney41岁，母亲Julian Waldron41岁。她于大约1627年与Peter Woodward Sr.在英国艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1666年6月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可迪德哈姆享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cheney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Chaney   with the same etymology as in 2 below.

French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’), or a habitational name from any of several places called (Le) Cheney, e.g. in Haute-Savoie, named with this word. Compare Chesney .

French Canadian: altered form of French Chesnay or Chenay, topographic names with the same meaning and etymology as in 2 above, or habitational names from (Le) Chesnay or (Le) Chenay, names of several places in the northwestern part of France, based on Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’. Compare Chenette and Chenier 2.

variants.name: Chenette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Armand.
Altered form of French Canadian Chenet, itself an (intermediate) altered form of Cheney 3. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
History: The (majority of the) Chenettes are descendants of Bertrand Chesnay/Chenay dit/sieur de La Garenne from Brittany (France); see Cheney .

variants.name: Chaney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any one of several places in Normandy, Picardy, or Artois (France) named (Le) Quesnay or Quesnoy, or elsewhere in northern France named (Le or La) Chesnay or Chesnoy. The placenames all derive from Old French chesnai or its Normanno-Picard equivalent quesnai ‘oak grove’ (medieval Latin casnetum).
French: variant of Chanet, a habitational name from any of various places called Chanet or Le Chanet, from Latin canna ‘reed’ + the suffix -etum denoting an inhabitant.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Ellen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Helen , although now no longer associated with that name. Initial H- tended to be added and dropped rather capriciously, leading to many doublets ( compare for example Esther and Hester ). It is also sometimes used as a short form of Eleanor , to which, however, it is unrelated.

variants.name: Eleanor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Ellen Cheney was born in 1607, in Bishop's Stortford, Hertfordshire, England, her father, Lawrence John Cheney, was 41 and her mother, Julian Waldron, was 41. She married Peter Woodward Sr. about 1627, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 June 1666, in Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 59.

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Ellen Cheney(이)가 1607년 영국 허트퍼드실르 비숍'스 스토르트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lawrence John Cheney(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julian Waldron(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1627년 영국 에세스 데드함에서 Peter Woodward Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1666년 6월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 데드함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Peter Woodward Sr. aproximadamente 1627, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1666, em Dedham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Ellen Cheney родилась в 1607 г. в местности бишоп'с стортфорд, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lawrence John Cheney было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Julian Waldron, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Woodward Sr. около 1627 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 июня 1666 г. в местности дедхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 59 лет.
